recurringCharges.label: Estimated Operating Expenses
recurringCharges.evidenceText: Estimated Operating Expenses for Lease Year 1 are $144,000.00 annually. Estimated Operating Expenses shall increase by three percent (3%) on each anniversary of the Rent Commencement Date.

recurringCharges.label: Administrative Fee
recurringCharges.evidenceText: Administrative Fee shall be $250.00 per month during Lease Year 1. Administrative Fee shall increase by two percent (2%) on each anniversary beginning April 1, 2028.
